name: Northern Chultan Waters
summary: Warm tropical sea north of Chult, where jungle coastlines, humid winds and sudden storms mark the final approach to the peninsula.
rumours: A ship vanished here without wreckage.
Lights have been seen beneath the waves.
Some sailors swear the sea speaks during storms.
dmSecrets: A wreck nearby carries something valuable.
One crew member may know more than they admit.
A storm could hide unnatural influence.
